task: Show me a list of blue baby boys' pajamas under $40, sorted by rating.

- All items are from Carter's, which dominates this category on JCPenney.

Note: JCPenney returned exactly 6 matching blue baby boys' pajama products under $40. Items #3 and #4 appear to be the same product in different style variants.
